macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

items.title: Asian shares rose and oil held gains as markets watched Iran talks and central bank signals
items.summary: Asian equities climbed in early trading while oil prices held gains as investors focused on U.S.-Iran negotiations and expected central bank moves. The report highlights a risk-on tone in global markets tied to geopolitics and monetary policy expectations.

items.title: U.S. stock futures pointed higher ahead of inflation data and Fed commentary
items.summary: Stocks were set to open higher as traders awaited PCE inflation data and remarks from Federal Reserve officials. The setup suggests markets were positioning around the next read on inflation and the policy outlook.

items.title: Bond yields fell after Trump signaled progress in Iran talks
items.summary: U.S. bond yields declined after comments from President Trump suggested progress in Iran talks. The move reflected a shift in investor positioning as geopolitical headlines eased some market pressure.

items.title: Gold prices rose as the dollar weakened and traders focused on the Fed outlook
items.summary: Gold edged higher as the U.S. dollar weakened and investors continued to track the Federal Reserve’s policy stance. The move also came amid attention to U.S.-Iran discussions.

items.title: U.S. markets hit fresh highs on a chip rally
items.summary: U.S. equity markets reached fresh highs, led by strength in semiconductor stocks. The advance underscored continued investor appetite for large-cap tech and chip-related names.

items.title: Fed-related coverage focused on Kevin Warsh’s debut and policy shift speculation
items.summary: Market commentary highlighted Kevin Warsh’s Fed debut as a sign of a potentially significant shift in U.S. monetary policy expectations. The coverage adds to the focus on future Federal Reserve leadership and direction.

items.title: Japanese and South Korean bonds rallied as yields plunged
items.summary: Japanese and South Korean bond yields fell sharply, accompanying gains in regional equities. The move points to a broader shift in global rates markets and investor demand for sovereign debt.

items.title: Indian stocks jumped as crude oil prices cooled
items.summary: India’s Sensex and Nifty rose sharply as oil prices eased and global markets strengthened. Lower crude prices were a key positive for domestic sentiment.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.
